findYourPerfectPouchSizeVisual: Find your perfect pouch size. Visual comparisons with cola cans. From 10g samples to 2kg bulk packs. No guesswork needed!
measuredFlatFromLeftToRightEdg: Measured flat, from left to right edge. This is how wide your pouch will be when laying flat.
fromBottomSealToTopSealOrZippe: From bottom seal to top seal (or zipper). Remember to add 10-15mm extra for sealing.
theFoldDepthOnEachSideThatCrea: The fold depth on each side that creates volume. Makes pouches stand up nicely.
compareWithA330mlColaCan122cmT: Compare with a 330ml cola can (12.2cm tall). Click any image to view full size.
premiumFlatBottomDesignMoreShe: Premium flat bottom design. More shelf presence. Same cola can reference.
getPhysicalSamplesInMultipleSi: Get physical samples in multiple sizes. See and feel the quality. Only $15 with free shipping!
